public_actions.description: Generate a Word (.docx) document from structured JSON and save it to the file system

parameters.content: Non-empty document blocks; also accepts Content IR blocks/content_ir with {type, text, data, children}
parameters.blocks: Content IR block alias for content

public_actions.description: Generate an Excel (.xlsx) spreadsheet from structured JSON and save it to the file system

parameters.sheets: Non-empty sheet objects with name, columns, rows; also accepts Content IR sheet blocks/content_ir
parameters.blocks: Content IR sheet block alias for sheets

public_actions.description: Generate a PowerPoint (.pptx) presentation from structured JSON and save it to the file system

parameters.slides: Non-empty slide objects with title, bullets, notes; also accepts Content IR slide blocks/content_ir
parameters.blocks: Content IR slide block alias for slides

public_actions.description: Generate a PDF document from structured JSON (same schema as docx) and save it to the file system

parameters.content: Non-empty document blocks; also accepts Content IR blocks/content_ir with {type, text, data, children}
parameters.blocks: Content IR block alias for content

public_actions.description: Convert an existing office file from one format to another (e.g. pptx→pdf, docx→pdf) using LibreOffice headless

parameters.file_id: Source file ID in the file storage system
parameters.target_format: Target format: pdf, docx, pptx, xlsx, png, etc.

public_actions.description: Generate an office file and return as an artifact (no file-name conflict)

parameters.content/sheets/slides: Non-empty content data for the chosen format
parameters.blocks/content_ir: Content IR aliases accepted for the chosen format

public_actions.description: Generate an office file and replace an existing file entry

parameters.content/sheets/slides: Non-empty content data for the chosen format
parameters.blocks/content_ir: Content IR aliases accepted for the chosen format

public_actions.description: Export an existing office file as an artifact for version management
